description: Aggregate microscopic vehicle routes into a macroscopic Origin-Destination (OD) matrix using SUMO's route2OD.py tool for the Bologna Pasubio scenario. Process the route file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio.rou.xml using a 3600-second interval and save the aggregated output to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_hourly.od. Identify the Origin-Destination edge pair with the highest number of trips during the first hour (0.00 to 3600.00). Record the Origin edge ID, Destination edge ID, and the maximum trip count (integer) to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/peak_od_pair.txt, with each value on its own line. If multiple pairs tie for the maximum number of trips, reporting any one of those pairs is acceptable.
